title: Totem Nerf
description: This Minecraft Plugin rebalances the Totem of Undying.
body:
# Totem Nerf Minecraft Plugin > [!WARNING] > **This project is no longer under development.** This plugin is discontinued and will not receive any further updates, bug fixes, or support. The repository remains available for archival purposes and for anyone who wishes to use the existing code as a reference. This Minecraft Plugin rebalances the **Totem of Undying**. The same project is available on [`GitHub`](https://github.com/Jufyer/totemNerf). ## Installation 1. Install this plugin just like any other Minecraft plugin. 2. If you're unsure how to do this, check out [`this tutorial by @KasaiSora`](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a3dvgl35ip8). You can download the latest release from the [`GitHub Releases page`](https://github.com/Jufyer/totemNerf/releases). ## Features ### Totem of Undying Consumes 1 Golden Apple

To use the Totem of Undying, you must have one Golden Apple in your inventory. If you don’t have one, the Totem will fail to activate, showing this animation:

And if you use your Totem of Undying you lose one Heart of you maximum Health. If you want to get this heart back you need to drink this Potion: ### New Potion System

The new brewing process for potions involved in the plugin. If you drink this Potion your maximum Health is set to 10 hearts. ### Limited Number of Totems

You can only carry one Totem of Undying at a time. You can adjust this limit with the command: `/setMaxTotems ` ## Contributing Pull requests are welcome! For major changes, please open an issue first to discuss your ideas. Ensure to update any relevant tests when making changes. ## License This plugin is distributed under [`GNU General Public License Version 3`](https://github.com/Jufyer/totemNerf/blob/master/LICENSE.txt)
